en: How does it feel to be a part of this sort of like moment at the Academy with horror?
Because it's you and it's Sinners. And Sinners, I mean, please, there's another original idea.
The horror has always kind of been that's that genre and it's over there.
But I think that's loosening up a little bit.
I hope so, because there's spectacular performances, spectacular craftsmanship,
really great writing. It's the same way on other films.
So I hope it opens up a little bit. It makes me feel good that I can actually say Sinners in the same vein as I can say
Hank Gladys with weapons, you know.
